usp.title: Why Choose Make It Neon?
usp.subtitle: We merge traditional craftsmanship with modern LED technology to bring you premium signs that last.
usp.handcraftedDesc: Every sign is produced in our own Zurich workshop with strict quality control at every stage.
usp.shippingDesc: Free delivery in Switzerland. Professional mounting service available in CH & southern Germany.
usp.energyDesc: Consumes 80% less energy than traditional glass neon. Eco-friendly and cool to the touch.
usp.warrantyDesc: Full coverage on materials, power supplies, and craftsmanship. Your satisfaction guaranteed.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From your idea to a glowing masterpiece — in five simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Pick a ready-made sign from our shop, or create your own using our live configurator. Choose text, font, color, and size — see the result instantly.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We send you a professional photo-mockup of your sign for approval within 24 hours — completely free, no commitment required.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Once approved, our artisans carefully bend and shape flexible LED neon tubes over a precision-cut acrylic backboard. Production takes 5–7 business days.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Every sign undergoes a thorough quality inspection and a 24-hour burn-in test. We photograph your finished sign and send it to you before shipping.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Your sign arrives in custom protective packaging with everything included: power adapter, mounting kit, and a step-by-step installation guide. Just plug in and enjoy!

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by 120+ happy customers across Switzerland and beyond.

reviews.name: Anna Müller
reviews.text: The 'Open' sign for my café turned out absolutely stunning. The quality is incredible and it brightens up the whole storefront. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Thomas & Sarah Weber
reviews.text: Our 'Better Together' sign was the highlight of the wedding. Guests couldn't stop taking photos. We now have it in our living room — pure magic.

reviews.name: Marco Bernasconi
reviews.text: Had a custom neon logo made for my barbershop. The team was professional, delivery was fast, and the sign looks even better than expected.

reviews.name: Lisa Chen
reviews.text: I ordered 'Dream Big' for my home office and I smile every time I see it. Great quality, energy-efficient, and the glow is perfect. Love it!

reviews.name: Reto Zimmermann
reviews.text: Excellent craftsmanship. Our restaurant sign has been running 12 hours daily for a year with zero issues. The mounting service was a nice bonus.

reviews.name: Julia Hofmann
reviews.text: The whole process was so easy — from the online calculator to delivery. The sign arrived perfectly packaged and looks absolutely stunning on our wall.

reviews.name: David Keller
reviews.text: We were blown away by the quality. The LED neon looks just like real glass neon but without the fragility. Our bar looks incredible now.

reviews.name: Sabrina Meier
reviews.text: From the first mockup to the final installation, the Make It Neon team was responsive and professional. Our beauty salon has never looked better!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our LED neon signs.
faq.noResults: No questions found. Try a different search term.

items.question: How do I order a custom neon sign?
items.answer: It's easy! Use our online calculator to enter your text, choose a font, color, and size. You'll see a live preview and instant price. Click 'Order Now' to submit your design, or 'Get Free Quote' to receive a detailed mockup by email.

items.question: How long does production take?
items.answer: Standard production time is 5-7 business days. Rush orders (2-3 days) are available for an additional charge. Custom logos and complex designs may take 7-10 business days.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, bank transfer (IBAN), and TWINT for Swiss customers. Payment is due upon order confirmation.

items.question: Can I cancel or modify my order?
items.answer: You can cancel or modify your order within 24 hours of placing it at no charge. After production has started, modifications may not be possible. Please contact us as soon as possible.

items.question: What is LED neon flex?
items.answer: LED neon flex is a modern alternative to traditional glass neon. It uses flexible LED strips encased in a silicone tube to create the same iconic glow. Benefits include: shatterproof, energy-efficient, cool to the touch, and much lighter than glass neon.

items.question: How long do LED neon signs last?
items.answer: Our LED neon signs are rated for 50,000+ hours of use — that's over 11 years of continuous operation (12 hours/day). They maintain consistent brightness throughout their lifespan.

items.question: What's the difference between indoor and outdoor signs?
items.answer: Indoor signs use a standard power supply and are designed for dry environments. Outdoor signs feature IP65 waterproof rating, UV-resistant materials, and a weatherproof power supply. The price for outdoor versions is 40% higher.

items.question: What colors are available?
items.answer: We offer 12 standard colors: White, Warm White, Ice Blue, Blue, Red, Pink, Hot Pink, Purple, Green, Yellow, Orange, and Lemon. We also offer RGB (color-changing) at an additional cost.

items.question: Can you make a sign from my logo?
items.answer: Absolutely! We specialize in custom logo neon signs. Simply upload your logo on our Custom Order page, and we'll create a free design mockup within 24 hours. Most logos can be faithfully recreated in LED neon.

items.question: Do you ship internationally?
items.answer: Yes! We offer worldwide shipping. Delivery is free within Switzerland. European shipping typically takes 3-5 business days, and worldwide shipments take 7-14 business days. All signs are carefully packaged for safe transit.

items.question: How is my sign packaged for shipping?
items.answer: Every sign is carefully packaged in custom-fit foam inside a sturdy cardboard box. We add extra padding around edges and connectors. Our packaging is designed to protect your sign during long-distance shipping.

items.question: Do you offer installation services?
items.answer: Yes, we offer professional installation in Zurich and surrounding areas (up to 100km). For other locations in Switzerland and southern Germany, we can arrange professional mounting upon request. All signs come with a DIY mounting kit included.
